title: DiskScanner
description: DiskScanner - a minimalistic plugin that will show the weight of folders on your server using one command.
body:
A maximally simple plugin that will show how much space a folder occupies on your server. Developed specifically for the Pterodactyl panel. Should also work without the panel.

**Usage:**
```
/scan <dir> <levels for scan>
```

**Example:**
```
/scan /home/container/plugins 2
```
or
```
/scan */plugins 2
```
Will display the weight of the folder itself, subfolders and sub-subfolders.

![You can do this not only in the console](https://i.imgur.com/C08HJES.png)
